utterances.speaker: Guy
utterances.text: Oh , it is you . I see you everywhere . I am Jim , Jim Nelson .

emotion_cause.span: 2_it is you . I see you everywhere .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh Jim , Jim Nelson I am Phoebe , Phoebe Buffay . We certainly have been seeing a lot of each other lately .

utterances.speaker: Jim
utterances.text: We have . Maybe we will be seeing each other at dinner tomorrow night , say around 8 o clock ?

emotion_cause.span: 4_Maybe we will be seeing each other at dinner tomorrow night , say around 8 o clock ?
